commands.name: sdk_marketplace_publish_guard
commands.description: Run beta9 SDK marketplace package and authentication preflight before any public mutation.

commands.name: github_release
commands.description: Create or update the GitHub Release from the manifest version and upload committed assets.
commands.command: git tag -f v0.1.0-beta.9 HEAD && git push origin refs/tags/v0.1.0-beta.9 --force-with-lease; gh release view v0.1.0-beta.9 --repo brik64/brik64-cli || gh release create v0.1.0-beta.9 --repo brik64/brik64-cli --title "BRIK64 CLI 0.1.0-beta.9" --notes-file CHANGELOG.md; gh release upload v0.1.0-beta.9 --repo brik64/brik64-cli --clobber evidence/beta9-package/brik64-cli-0.1.0-beta.9.tgz evidence/beta9-package/package.manifest.json evidence/beta9-package/release-manifest.candidate.json evidence/beta9-package/SHA256SUMS; gh release edit v0.1.0-beta.9 --repo brik64/brik64-cli --title "BRIK64 CLI 0.1.0-beta.9" --notes-file CHANGELOG.md --prerelease --draft=false

commands.name: sdk_npm
commands.description: Publish the TypeScript SDK package with the manifest beta version.
commands.command: npm view @brik64/core@0.1.0-beta.9 version >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm publish --tag beta /Users/carlosjperez/Documents/GitHub/brik64-lib-js/evidence-beta9-pack/brik64-core-0.1.0-beta.9.tgz

commands.name: sdk_pypi
commands.description: Publish the Python SDK package with twine.
commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY' || python3 -m twine upload /Users/carlosjperez/Documents/GitHub/brik64-lib-python/dist/brik64-0.1.0b9*
import urllib.request
urllib.request.urlopen('https://pypi.org/pypi/brik64/0.1.0b9/json', timeout=20).close()
PY

commands.name: gcp_curl
commands.description: Upload CLI installer metadata and package artifacts to the curl/GCP public surface.

commands.name: docs_dispatch
commands.description: Dispatch docs update using the manifest payload.

commands.name: web_dispatch
commands.description: Dispatch web/CMS update using the manifest payload.

commands.name: post_publish_live_verify
commands.description: Re-run public live verification after publication.

rollback: Do not delete historical release artifacts.
If any channel fails after publication begins, create a superseding manifest with state "failed" for 0.1.0-beta.9.
Restore curl/GCP channel manifest to the previous known-good manifest object.
Create a GitHub Release note amendment that points to the superseding manifest.
Run release-train-live-verify and keep the failed report as evidence.
boundary: This script generates and verifies the publication plan. It never mutates public surfaces directly.
